steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize calcite's Mohs scale number”—the answer must make calcite's number (3) the primary focus.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly states “Calcite has a Mohs scale number of 3” and immediately explains what that number means—making it the primary focus of the entire statement. The others fail to highlight calcite's specific number. That matches choice A — A is correct.
